case_title: REDWOOD CREDIT UNION VS. JOSEPH BROWN, ET AL.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2015 BY CYNTHIA M. LEE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PAMELA MULLING--FAD REPRESENTATIVE OFFICER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT JAMES OTT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
